tipsPath.title: How to play
tipsPath.body: A target sequence appears above the grid. Drag across tiles to connect them in that exact color and number order.

tipsPath.title: Adjacent steps
tipsPath.body: Each new tile must be orthogonally next to the previous one (up, down, left, or right). You cannot reuse a tile in the same path.

tipsPath.title: Time
tipsPath.body: The clock counts down. Finished rounds add time, but the bonus per round shrinks and your max reserve drops as you advance — stay ahead of zero.

tipsPath.title: Score & streak
tipsPath.body: Longer sequences and streaks multiply your points. A wrong path clears your streak but you can try again immediately.
